title: Status mail draft prototype
objective: Test whether a structured input bundle can produce a credible first draft for PM review.
tested_assumptions: A structured first draft reduces PM reconstruction work
Traceability improves trust in recurring automation
proof_generated: A structured draft is credible when workflow state is current
Stale state remains the main trust failure mode
learnings: A structured draft is useful when issue status and decision context are current.
Narrative quality drops when upstream state is stale.
strategic_implication: The prototype supports a challenger posture focused on trusted PM operating outputs rather than full workspace replacement.
